chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1440 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 11.08.2025 None present for the applicant. None present for the complainant. Mr. Zahoor Shah, A.P.G. Sindh. ------------------------------- On 02.07.2025 the applicant’s counsel was present and his brief was held thereafter on 15.07.2025 the applicant was again called absent. Today is the third date and none are present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
